allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\accenture_projects\\exercicios_accenture\\dia06\\GenAi"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\mvnw.cmd" -ArgumentList "spring-boot:run" -RedirectStandardOutput "run4_output.txt" -RedirectStandardError "run4_error.txt" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/q" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; "BODY: $\($response.Content\)" } catch { "ERROR: $_" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process -Id $proc.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force)
